nasb.text: He made fifty clasps of gold and joined the curtains to one another with the clasps, so the tabernacle was a unit.

esv.text: And he made fifty clasps of gold, and coupled the curtains one to the other with clasps. So the tabernacle was a single whole.

cnv.text: 又做了五十個金鉤，用鉤子使幔子彼此相連。這樣就成了一個帳幕。

ccb.text: 又做了五十个金钩，把两幅大幔子连在一起，成为圣幕。
